function.message: I can’t fully complete this inbox request as written because one of the five requested OCR targets is missing from `50_finance/purchases/`. I verified the inbox instructions and checked the purchases directory; only four of the requested records are available.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied process-next-inbox-item workflow, OCR + migration workflows, finance schema, and clarification rule requiring no partial completion when a listed required file is missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction in `00_inbox/724_next-task.md` explicitly lists five files. After reading four successfully, the fifth requested entry could not be opened and is not present in the purchases directory listing, so completing all requested OCR targets is impossible without assumptions.
